Sector 01 — Industrial Campaign

Tactical missions

Every dirty surface is a mission. Bazuke strikes with calibrated pressurized steam that destroys grime without harming the surface underneath. Targets eliminated, every time.

Sector 02 — Intel

The power of steam

It's not just pressurized water. High-temperature steam reaches where chemicals can't, kills bacteria and mold, and uses a fraction of the water. That's why Bazuke hits harder and protects the planet.

100% Eco-Friendly

No toxic detergents. Safe for your plants, pets and family.

Kills 99% of Germs

Steam heat sanitizes mold, mildew and bacteria at the source.

Saves Water

Up to 80% less water than traditional pressure washing.

Caliber: Steam · ECO grade
